source_section.title_label_raw: Design Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District

sections.title_label_raw: Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District Applicability of Design Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District Applicability of Design Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District
provisions.text: In addition to the design requirements in Part VII, the requirements of this Chapter apply for new construction or additions on properties:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District Applicability of Design Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District
provisions.text: abutting a registered heritage property along the same streetline or abutting a heritage conservation district along the same streetline; and (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District Applicability of Design Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District
provisions.text: located within a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District Applicability of Design Requirements for Properties Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Properties Abutting a Heritage Conservation District
provisions.text: In the event that the requirements under Part VII conflict with the requirements of this Chapter, the requirements of this Chapter take precedence. (RCCC-Dec 14/22;E-Jan 5/23) Design Requirement: Maintenance of Same or Similar Cornice Line Height

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 381(2), the streetwall height for any new

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 381(2), the streetwall height for any new
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 381(2), the streetwall height for any new main building or any addition to an existing main building shall be required to be located at a height that is within 2.0 metres of the cornice line height established by abutting registered heritage buildings or abutting main buildings within a heritage conservation district, except where the maximum required streetwall height permitted in Part V is lower than the cornice line of the abutting main buildings, then the maximum streetwall height required under Part V shall not be exceeded (Diagram 18).

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 381(2), the streetwall height for any new
provisions.text: If the new main building or addition to a main building is located on a property that is in between:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 381(2), the streetwall height for any new
provisions.text: registered heritage properties that are located on each side of the subject property along the same streetline; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 381(2), the streetwall height for any new
provisions.text: a registered heritage property and a heritage conservation district along the same streetline; then either of the two cornice lines may be used to meet the requirements of Subsection 381(1). Diagram 18: Maintenance of same or similar cornice line height for development on properties abutting a registered heritage property or on properties abutting a heritage conservation district, per Section 381 Design Requirement: Side Wall Setback or Stepback for Taller Portions of New Buildings or Additions to Buildings

sections.title_label_raw: Where any main building is located less than 3.0 metres from a

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where any main building is located less than 3.0 metres from a
provisions.text: Where any main building is located less than 3.0 metres from a side lot line abutting a registered heritage property or a property within a heritage conservation district, a minimum required stepback of 1.5 metres, above the height of the streetwall, shall be provided from the side wall directly opposite the registered heritage property or a property within a heritage conservation district and shall be required for a minimum depth of 12.0 metres from a streetline (Diagram 19).

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where any main building is located less than 3.0 metres from a
provisions.text: Where any main building is located 3.0 metres or more from a side lot line abutting a registered heritage property or a property within a heritage conservation district, no stepback requirement applies (Diagram 20). Diagram 19: Minimum 1.5-metre sidewall stepback for any new main building or any addition to an existing main building from the abutting registered heritage property or the abutting property within a heritage conservation district, per Subsection 382(1) Diagram 20: Minimum required side setback of 3.0 metres for any new main building or any addition to an existing main building from the abutting registered heritage property or the abutting property within a heritage conservation district, per Subsection 382(2)
